name: Almond Praline Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Dark brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Combine the cracker crumbs, toasted almonds, brown sugar, and melted butter in a bowl. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add the condensed milk until smooth. Add the eggs and almond extract, stirring to combine.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes. Then reduce the temperature to 300°F (150°C) and bake for an additional hour.
6. Remove from the oven and top with Almond Praline Topping before chilling.
Almond Praline Topping:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the dark brown sugar and whipping cream.
2. Cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
3. Simmer for 5 minutes or until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped almonds.
